Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB coding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurrenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Item.Text: PROFILE01 active, just one profile supported
Pairing aborted due to external circumstances

Data.Name: Wheel Pulse Counter rear left (96 per rotation)
Wheel Pulse Counter rear right (96 per rotation)

Item.Text: BT Link not in Use due variant coding
USB not in use due to variant coding
USB not supported in hardware variant

MAGNA E-Car Systems GmbH & Co OG

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Test.Description: An incorrect variant coding or configuration was detected
The control unit for telematics services was deactivated because of a crash signal.
The control unit for telematics services has a malfunction.
The GPS antenna has a malfunction.

The GPS antenna has a malfunction.

The USB connection has a malfunction.

The mobile phone main antenna has a malfunction.
The mobile phone antennas have a malfunction.

The mobile phone backup antenna has a malfunction.
The mobile phone backup antenna has a malfunction.
The button ''Emergency call system'' has a malfunction.
The button ''Emergency call system'' has a malfunction.
The button ''Emergency call system'' has a malfunction.
The button ''Emergency call system'' has a malfunction.
The button ''MB-Info'' has a malfunction.
The button ''MB-Info'' has a malfunction.
The button ''MB-Info'' has a malfunction.
The button ''MB-Info'' has a malfunction.
The button ''Mercedes-Benz Service24h'' has a malfunction.
The button ''Mercedes-Benz Service24h'' has a malfunction.
The button ''Mercedes-Benz Service24h'' has a malfunction.
The button ''Mercedes-Benz Service24h'' has a malfunction.
Registration with the server for telematics services has failed.
Switch ''Mobile phone antenna'' has a malfunction.
Switch ''Mobile phone antenna'' has a malfunction.
Switch ''Mobile phone antenna'' has a malfunction.
The cable for audio muting has a malfunction.
The cable for audio muting has a malfunction.
The cable for audio muting has a malfunction.
The configuration of the SIM card profile is incorrect.
The coding of the control unit is incomplete.
The power supply is too low.
The power supply is too high
The current vehicle identification number is incorrect or not present.
The digital input of the crash signal has a malfunction.
Communication with the hybrid CAN bus has a malfunction.
Communication with the hybrid CAN bus has a malfunction.
Communication with the control unit ''combustion engine'' has a malfunction.
Communication with control unit "Electric machine A" has a malfunction.
Communication with control unit ''High-voltage battery'' has a malfunction.
Communication with the instrument cluster has a malfunction.
Communication with the electronic ignition lock has a malfunction.
Communication with control unit "Electric machine B" has a malfunction.
Implausible data were received from the air conditioning.
Implausible data were received from control unit ''Drivetrain''.
Communication with the diagnostic CAN bus has a malfunction.
Communication with the diagnostic CAN bus has a malfunction.
An implausible wheel speed signal was received.
